source.title: Arc Flash Fire - Perdido SPAR - SCR Failure

context.region: Gulf of Mexico - Alaminos Canyon Block 857

actions_taken: H&P Drill Crew secured the well in four minutes
All rig power was shut down
Fire crew assembled and put on standby outside SCR house for 30 minutes
SCR cabinet #1 isolated from system for repair
Rest of SCR system returned to normal operating condition
event.summary: On October 3, 2024, at approximately 9:00 am, an arc flash fire occurred on Shell's Perdido SPAR when a Silicon Controlled Rectifier (SCR) failed in the SCR house. During wireline logging operations, the cement pump was being used to pump base oil into well GA017 for hydrate mitigation when the cement unit's electronic panel lost power. When the Tool Pusher and Rig Electrician entered the SCR room to investigate, they heard a loud popping sound and observed smoke. Evidence of arcing between DC buss bars, arcing on circuit breaker heat sinks, and a failed buss insulator in SCR cabinet #1 was identified. The fire and gas alarm system did not detect the fire; it was only identified when personnel entered the SCR house. The well was secured and SCR cabinet #1 was isolated for repair.
key_phrases: fire and gas alarm system did not indicate a fire

hazards.name: Electrical Energy - High Voltage DC System

threats.name: Internal component failure - buss insulator degradation

consequences.name: Arc flash fire in SCR house
Loss of electrical power to drilling operations
Smoke generation and potential personnel exposure

controls.name: Monthly and semiannual SCR maintenance schedule
controls.barrier_role: Preventive maintenance to detect component degradation

supporting_text: All inspections and maintenance were completed and up to date according to the maintenance records
The thermal imaging scans did not include a scan of the SCR cabinet's internals under load due to safety concerns
A thermal imaging scan of the closed SCR cabinet from the outside could not have identified internal component failure

controls.name: Thermal imaging scans of components
controls.barrier_role: Detection of overheating and component degradation

supporting_text: The thermal imaging scans did not include a scan of the SCR cabinet's internals under load due to safety concerns of a high voltage circuit
A thermal imaging scan of the closed SCR cabinet from the outside could not have identified internal component failure because the cabinet is designed to dissipate any heat generated on the inside

controls.name: Fire and gas alarm system in SCR house
controls.barrier_role: Early detection of fire to enable emergency response
controls.lod_basis: Automated detection system for emergency conditions

supporting_text: The rig fire and gas alarm system did not indicate a fire had occurred in the SCR house
The fire was only identified when personnel entered the SCR house

controls.name: Personnel investigation and manual detection
controls.lod_basis: Human observation and response to equipment anomalies

supporting_text: The Halliburton Cementer immediately notified the H&P 205's Rig Manager and Tool Pusher of the situation
The H&P Tool Pusher and Rig Electrician was dispatched to the SCR room to investigate
When the Tool Pusher and Rig Electrician entered the East side entrance to the SCR room, they heard a loud popping sound and observed smoke

controls.name: Emergency shutdown procedures and well securing
controls.barrier_role: Limit escalation by securing well and shutting down power

supporting_text: The H&P Drill Crew was advised by the H&P Tool Pusher to secure the well and all rig power was shut down
The well was secured in four minutes

controls.name: Fire crew assembly and standby
controls.barrier_role: Emergency response capability for fire suppression
controls.lod_basis: Emergency response team for fire fighting

supporting_text: The fire crew was assembled and put on standby outside the SCR house for 30 minutes

controls.name: SCR cabinet isolation capability
controls.barrier_role: Isolate failed equipment to prevent further damage
controls.lod_basis: System design allows isolation of failed components

supporting_text: SCR cabinet #1 was isolated from the system for repair and the rest of the SCR system was returned to normal operating condition

notes.rules: JSON output only. mentioned fields must be evidence-based. Use null for unknown values.
